arts.ttl: Italy’s Finest Gear Up for Champions League Glory: Inter, Milan & Juventus Lead the Charge
arts.sum: The 2024/25 Champions League season is around the corner, with five Serie A teams looking to take the title back to Italy after 15 years. The last Italian club to conquer the most prestigious European tournament was Inter, doing so in their famous treble-winning 2009/10 campaign under Jose Mourinho. The post Italy’s Finest Gear Up for Champions League Glory: Inter, Milan & Juventus Lead the Charge appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Chiellini seals return to Juventus as executive
arts.sum: Former Italy and Juventus defender Giorgio Chiellini has returned to the Italian club in an executive role focusing on relations with national and international football institutions, the Serie A side said on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Juventus & Long-Serving Stalwart Considering Contract Termination in January
arts.sum: Juventus and Danilo could reportedly decide to part ways by mutual consent this winter after the Brazilian lost his place in the starting XI. According to Calciomercato via Tuttojuve, the possibility of a contract termination is gaining momentum, with the 33-year-old contemplating a January exit. The post Juventus & Long-Serving Stalwart Considering Contract Termination in January appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.
